MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT FRANK VILLANUEVA's Re-Notice Motion For Order Disqualifying Plaintiff's Counsel is MOOT. A notice of substitution was filed on February 11, 2013. Jason Wolford has substituted in as counsel for Plaintiffs. Judge Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
